columns.name: FKA_EFAKTURA
columns.description: Indicates whether the payment is related to an invoice

columns.name: FKA_AVTALEGIRO
columns.description: Identifies if the agreement involves a giro (bank transfer) system

columns.name: FKA_AUTOGIRO
columns.description: Indicates whether the payment method is an auto-giro

columns.name: FKA_ORDRETYPE
columns.description: The type of order (e.g., service, product)

columns.name: FKA_BETBET
columns.description: An amount or value related to the payment

columns.name: FKA_D365ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the record in Dynamics 365 system
